data.title: 'Release Elon Musk On The Federal Government!' Kevin O'Leary Backs Musk's Cost-Cutting Power
Fiserv Earnings Enjoy 24% Boost, Raises 2024 Outlook On Heels Of DoorDash Partnership
data.description: Fiserv reported organic revenue grew 15% and adjusted operating margin increased after a partnership with DoorDash was announced.

data.title: Meta's Smart Glasses Dominate Ray-Ban Stores, AI Features Still Missing
data.description: Ray-Ban Meta glasses are the top-selling product in 60% of European stores, driving significant sales for parent company EssilorLuxottica.

data.title: General Motors Surpasses Q3 Earnings And Revenue Estimates
data.description: General Motors (NYSE: GM) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.96 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.49 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.28 per share a year ago. These figures are adjusted for non-recurring items.

data.title: Apple iPhone 16 Discounts Roll Out on Alibaba's Tmall, AI Delays and Domestic Competitors Fuel Aggressive Pricing
data.description: Apple reduces iPhone 16 prices by up to 1,600 yuan on Alibaba's Tmall store for Singles' Day, aiming to boost sales amid lukewarm response in China.
